block.header: kotitakyeba wobatuseyama no ipakwi ni mo wite komoranamu na kwopwi so wagimo
tukupane ni apamu to ipisi kwo pa ta ga koto kikeba ka mine apazukyemu

sentence.transcription: mi ne apa zu kye mu

block.header: tukupane ni iporite tuma nasi ni wa ga nemu yworo pa paya mo akenu kamo

sentence.transcription: wa ga ne mu yworo pa

block.header: takapama ni kiyosuru nami no oki tu nami yosu tomo yorazi kwora ni si yoraba
takapama no sitakaze sayagu imo wo kwopi tuma to ipaba ya sikwotomye situ mo
arasaka no kamwi no misake wo tage to ipikyeba ka mo yo wa ga wepinikyemu

sentence.transcription: wa ga wepi ni kye mu

block.header: iyazeru no aze no kwomatu ni yupu sidete wa wo puri miyu mo azekwo si mapamo
usipo ni pa tatamu to ipedo nase no kwo ga yaswosimakakuri wa wo misaba sirisi

sentence.transcription: wa wo mi saba siri si

block.header: sirwotori no pa ga tutumi wo tutumu tomo arapu ma mo ukwi pakwoye
utukusiki wome no sasapa ni arare puri simo puru tomo na kare sone wome no sasaba
sinwopara no otopimye no kwo wo sapitoyu mo winetemu sida ya ipye ni kudasamu

sentence.transcription: wi ne te mu sida ya

block.header: tokoyopye ni kumo tatiwataru midunoye no urasima no kwo ga koto motiwataru
yamatopye ni kaze pukiagete kumobanare soki wori tomo yo wa wo wasurasu na
kwora ni kwopwi asatwo wo piraki wa ga woreba tokoyo no pama no nami no to kikoyu
midunoye no urasima no kwo ga tamakusige akezu ariseba mata mo apamasi wo
tokoyopye ni kumo tatiwataru tamakusige patukani akesi ware zo kanasiki
ama no para purisakemireba kasumi tati ipyedi madwopite yuku pye sirazu mo
suminoye no opokura mukite tobaba koso payatori to ipame nani ka payatori
arare puru kisima ga take wo sagasimito kusa tworikanete imo ga te wo tworu
masurawo no satuya tabasami mukapitati iru ya matwokata pama no sayakesa
